findings.description: Frank Ogletree was the father of Lewis Ogletree. Born December 1870 in Georgia; enumerated as head of household in the 1900 and 1910 U.S. censuses in Troup County, Georgia.
supporting_sources: "United States, Census, 1900", FamilySearch — Troup County, Georgia; household of Frank and Carrie Ogletree, with Lewis as son.
"United States, Census, 1910", FamilySearch — West Point, Troup County, Georgia; household of Frank Ogletree.

findings.description: Carrie Hogg (indexed as Carrie Ogletree after marriage) was the mother of Lewis Ogletree. Born 1876 in Georgia; married Frank Ogletree on 4 December 1895 in Troup County, Georgia.
supporting_sources: "United States, Census, 1900", FamilySearch — Troup County, Georgia; household of Frank and Carrie Ogletree, with Lewis as son.
Troup County, Georgia marriage record — Frank Ogletree to Carrie Hogg, 4 December 1895 (mother's maiden name).
